changes.description: TimeoutError class and withTimeout function were inserted between escapeHtml JSDoc comment and escapeHtml function definition, breaking the JSDoc association. Moved them after escapeHtml into a dedicated section with a consistent section separator comment (Issue #627). No functional change.

commits: 1973ff64: refactor(utils): fix JSDoc association and organize timeout utilities
summary: Fixed a code organization issue in src/lib/utils.ts where the Issue #627 additions (TimeoutError, withTimeout) were inserted between the escapeHtml JSDoc comment and its function definition, breaking the JSDoc association. Moved them to a dedicated section at the end of the file with a consistent section separator comment. Other target files (src/types/git.ts, src/lib/git/git-utils.ts, src/lib/summary-prompt-builder.ts, src/lib/daily-summary-generator.ts) were reviewed and found to be well-structured with consistent naming, proper JSDoc, appropriate error handling, and good test coverage. All 6131 tests pass, 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors.
